display_name: Agent Runway — Canadian Real Estate Analytics
description: Connect your AI assistant to your Agent Runway real estate business data. Query transactions, pipeline deals, CRM clients, expenses, mileage, tax estimates, forecasts, and more — all through natural language.

authentication.description: Supabase JWT access token from an Agent Runway Pro account.

tools.name: get_server_info
tools.description: Returns MCP server version and available tools list.

tools.name: get_dashboard_kpis
tools.description: YTD GCI, transactions, expenses, pipeline value, goal progress.

tools.name: get_runway_score
tools.description: 0-100 composite business health grade (A+ to F).

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Projected year-end GCI based on pace + pipeline.

tools.name: get_tax_estimate
tools.description: Canadian income tax estimate with CPP, federal/provincial tax, quarterly installments.

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Closed transactions with address, sale price, GCI, side, date.

tools.name: get_transaction_summary
tools.description: Aggregate GCI, deal count, volume by year.

tools.name: get_pipeline
tools.description: Active pipeline deals with stage, probability, weighted GCI.

tools.name: get_pipeline_forecast
tools.description: Stage-by-stage pipeline breakdown with goal coverage ratio.

tools.name: get_clients
tools.description: CRM client list with flight status, contact info, property interest.

tools.name: get_client_detail
tools.description: Detailed client profile with activities and linked pipeline deals.

tools.name: get_expenses
tools.description: YTD expenses by category with monthly recurring totals.

tools.name: get_mileage_summary
tools.description: Business mileage log with CRA deduction amount.

tools.name: get_flight_control_priorities
tools.description: Outreach queue — clients needing follow-up with AI-drafted messages.

tools.name: get_user_settings
tools.description: Agent profile, goals, business settings, subscription status.
